name: hESC-derived RPE advanced dry AMD and Stargardt phase 1/2 studies
summary: Two prospective open-label phase 1/2 studies of subretinal hESC-derived retinal pigment epithelium transplantation in atrophic age-related macular degeneration and Stargardt macular dystrophy.
population: Nine patients with atrophic age-related macular degeneration and nine patients with Stargardt macular dystrophy

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Stem Cell Replacement and Transplantation because they can show whether the intervention changes safety and function in Nine patients with atrophic age-related macular degeneration and nine patients with Stargardt macular dystrophy. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
